title: Chromosomal DNA Extraction from Gram-positive Bacteria
author: Anders Kiledal

steps.title: Inoculate 10 mL rich medium from...
steps.instruction: Inoculate 10 mL rich medium from a fresh overnight culture, and incubate at appropriate temperature on shaker. At OD600 of ~0.8-1.0, harvest cells by centrifugation (10 min., 5000 rpm).

steps.title: Resuspend cell pellet in 2 mL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cell pellet in 2 mL TEN (10 mM Tris-HCl, pH 8.0, 10 mM EDTA, 150 mM NaCl).

steps.title: Add 100 μL lysozyme (20 mg/mL)...
steps.instruction: Add 100 μL lysozyme (20 mg/mL) and incubate for 20 min at 37ºC.

steps.title: Add 20 μL RNAse (10 mg/mL)...
steps.instruction: Add 20 μL RNAse (10 mg/mL) and incubate for 3 min at 65ºC.

steps.title: IF THE STRAIN PRODUCES A SURFACTANT...
steps.instruction: IF THE STRAIN PRODUCES A SURFACTANT THAT INTERFERES WITH THE PHASE SEPARATION, Add 0.1 volume 3 M sodium acetate and 1 volume cold isopropanol, mix, and incubate on ice for 20 min. Centrifuge for 10 min at 5000 rpm and decant the supernatant. Then resuspend in 400 μL TEN and 550 μL TEN* and transfer to a microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 900 μL phenol, mix by inversion
steps.instruction: Add 900 μL phenol, mix by inversion. Centrifuge for 5 min. at 13000 rpm and transfer the upper phase to a clean microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Re-extract once with phenol (1 volume)...
steps.instruction: Re-extract once with phenol (1 volume) and twice with chloroform: isoamyl alcohol (24:1 v/v, 1 volume)

steps.title: Collect DNA by coiling on the...
steps.instruction: Collect DNA by coiling on the end of a glass Pasteur pipet.

steps.title: Air dry, then resuspend DNA in...
steps.instruction: Air dry, then resuspend DNA in 100 μL sterile water overnight at 4ºC.

steps.title: Add 40 µl SDS, a small...
steps.instruction: Add 40 µl SDS, a small scoop of proteinase K and 550 µl TEN*. Vortex, then incubate at 60°C for 2 hours.

steps.title: Transfer upper phase to 10 mL cold 100% ethanol
steps.instruction: Transfer upper phase to 10 mL cold 100% ethanol.
